nasb.text: When you prepare a bull as a burnt offering or a sacrifice, to fulfill a special vow, or for peace offerings to the Lord,

esv.text: And when you offer a bull as a burnt offering or sacrifice, to fulfill a vow or for peace offerings to the Lord,

cnv.text: 你若是預備公牛犢作燔祭，或是別的祭，為要還特許的願，或是作平安祭，獻給耶和華，

ccb.text: 如果用公牛作燔祭、平安祭、还愿祭或别的祭献给耶和华，
